summary: Built the Orchestration capability with a YAML-defined dispatcher framework (load, list, validate, convert to Zo agent config), 3 dispatcher definitions (morning 3-task, evening 3-task, healthcheck 2-task), and a workflow state machine with 6 states (intake→classify→route→process→respond→close) supporting advance/rollback events. All 3 scenarios pass.
decisions: Cron-to-RRULE conversion is simplified (daily frequency only) — full RRULE mapping in Layer 2
broadcast: Orchestration API: load_dispatcher(name) → DispatcherDef, to_agent_config(def) → Zo agent config. Workflow.default() for standard 6-state pipeline. workflow.advance(state, event) → next_state.
